name: pdf
tagline: Reference guide for PDF operations (merge, split, extract, OCR, forms, encrypt) via pypdf, pdfplumber, reportlab and CLI tools.
verdict: Safe, purely local document-processing reference with no network, secrets, or destructive commands — all security checks pass or are not-applicable. Quality is solid (concrete code per task, idempotent outputs, a tool-selection table) but it never states when NOT to use it and gives no failure-handling guidance for its many external tools. Hygiene is.

highlights.summary: pip install pytesseract pdf2image with no version pin; well-known packages so warning not fail.
Description covers 'anything with PDF files' with no exclusions or pointers to better-suited skills anywhere in the file.
Only pdftk gets an 'if available' caveat (line 219); no failure guidance for pypdf/pdfplumber/qpdf/OCR errors, bad passwords, or missing tools.
